All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AudioController
Controller responsible for playing background audio in the application.
FinalController
Controller for the final game view.
FinalStage
Represents the final game view.
GameController
Main controller of the game.
GameModel
Model representing the game state.
GameStage
Represents the main game view.
IGame
Interface representing the game state and logic.
ITimer
Interface representing a game timer.
IWord
Interface representing word management logic.
LevelController
Controller responsible for level progression logic.
Main
Main class that launches the application.
MenuController
Controller for the main menu.
MenuStage
Represents the main menu view.
TimerModel
Model responsible for game timer logic.
UIController
Controller responsible for updating UI elements.
WordController
Controller responsible for word management.
WordModel
Model responsible for managing words by level.
